diffs.diff:
--- a/test_imports.sh
+++ b/test_imports.sh
@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+echo "Testing scatter"

+python -c "import torch; import torch_scatter; print('scatter ok')"

+echo "Testing sparse"

+python -c "import torch; import torch_sparse; print('sparse ok')"

+echo "Testing cluster"

+python -c "import torch; import torch_cluster; print('cluster ok')"

+echo "Testing pyg"

+python -c "import torch; import torch_geometric; print('pyg ok')"

+echo "Testing torchmdnet"

+python -c "import torch; import torchmdnet; print('torchmdnet ok')"

+echo "Testing e3nn"

+python -c "import torch; import e3nn; print('e3nn ok')"
